codeReview.summary: The dispatch refactor makes dispatch confirmation the canonical owner of final invoicing, persists logistics metadata on the packaging-slip truth boundary, and redacts commercial/accounting fields from pure factory responses while preserving admin/sales visibility. The reviewed controller, invoice-service, dispatch-engine, and integration-test changes align with the feature contract for operational-only factory views, challan output, replay safety, and dispatch-owned final invoice creation, and I did not find a blocking regression in the touched code paths.

summary: Pass. Dispatch now owns final invoice creation, factory surfaces are operational-only, logistics metadata is persisted, and challan/replay behavior is covered by the reviewed tests.
